race.comment: DUST CLOUD (3) broke the maiden status in dominant fashion here at the latest effort and will have derived a stack of confidence from that breakthrough victory. Winning jockey Thompson stays on top and can go right on with the job now. TEELG (1) returned in good order with a solid Sunny Coast maiden win and looks to have plenty of upside. Shapes as a leading contender. DEVINE SQUIRE (4) was a touch plain last time out but the Murwillumbah win prior was good enough for a race of this calibre. Watch for sharp improvement. ATLANTIC COAST (7) will be ready to peak now fourth run back and may trouble the judge with any luck in running. ICED CHOCOLATE (12) next best from the astute Vandyke yard.
